home.title: Digital goods, delivered instantly.
home.subtitle: License keys, accounts, and managed fulfillment — paid in crypto, delivered securely.
home.feature1Body: Keys and accounts are released automatically the moment payment is confirmed.
home.feature2Body: Pay with USDT on-chain. Every payment is verified server-side before fulfillment.
home.feature3Body: Credentials are encrypted and access is audited end to end.
